en: A PSALM OF DAVID, FOR THE MEMORIAL OFFERING. O LORD, rebuke me not in your anger, nor discipline me in your wrath!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你不要在忿怒中責備我， 也不要在烈怒中管教我。

en: For your arrows have sunk into me, and your hand has come down on me.
zh: 因為你的箭射入我身， 你的手壓住我。

en: There is no soundness in my flesh because of your indignation; there is no health in my bones because of my sin.
zh: 因你的忿怒，我體無完膚； 因我的罪惡，我的骨頭都不安妥。

en: For my iniquities have gone over my head; like a heavy burden, they are too heavy for me.
zh: 我的罪孽高過我的頭， 如同重擔，使我擔當不起。

en: My wounds stink and fester because of my foolishness,
zh: 因為我的愚昧， 我的傷口發臭流膿。

en: I am utterly bowed down and prostrate; all the day I go about mourning.
zh: 我屈身彎腰，彎到極低， 整天哀痛，到處行走。

en: For my sides are filled with burning, and there is no soundness in my flesh.
zh: 我的兩腰灼痛， 我體無完膚。

en: I am feeble and crushed; I groan because of the tumult of my heart.
zh: 我已經疲乏無力，被壓得粉碎了； 我因心裡痛苦而唉哼。

en: O Lord, all my longing is before you; my sighing is not hidden from you.
zh: 主啊！我的心願都在你面前， 我不向你隱瞞我的歎息。

en: My heart throbs; my strength fails me, and the light of my eyes- it also has gone from me.
zh: 我的心劇烈跳動，我的力量衰退； 連我眼中的光彩也消逝了。

en: My friends and companions stand aloof from my plague, and my nearest kin stand far off.
zh: 我的良朋密友因我的災禍，都站到一旁去； 我的親人也都站得遠遠的。

en: Those who seek my life lay their snares; those who seek my hurt speak of ruin and meditate treachery all day long.
zh: 那些尋索我命的，設下網羅； 那些想要害我的，口說威嚇的話， 他們整天思想詭計。

en: But I am like a deaf man; I do not hear, like a mute man who does not open his mouth.
zh: 至於我，像個聾子，不能聽見； 像個啞巴，不能開口。

en: I have become like a man who does not hear, and in whose mouth are no rebukes.
zh: 我竟變成了一個像是不能聽見的人， 變成了一個口中不能反駁的人。

en: But for you, O LORD, do I wait; it is you, O Lord my God, who will answer.
zh: 耶和華啊！我等候你； 主我的 神啊！你必應允我。

en: For I said, "Only let them not rejoice over me, who boast against me when my foot slips!"
zh: 因為我曾說：“恐怕他們向我誇耀； 我的腳滑跌的時候，不要讓他們向我誇口。”

en: For I am ready to fall, and my pain is ever before me.
zh: 我隨時會跌倒， 我的痛苦常在我面前。

en: I confess my iniquity; I am sorry for my sin.
zh: 我要承認我的罪孽， 我要因我的罪憂傷。

en: But my foes are vigorous, they are mighty, and many are those who hate me wrongfully.
zh: 但我強悍的仇敵眾多， 無理憎恨我的不斷增加。

en: Those who render me evil for good accuse me because I follow after good.
zh: 那些以惡報善的都與我作對， 因為我追求良善。

en: Do not forsake me, O LORD! O my God, be not far from me!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你不要離棄我； 我的 神啊，求你不要遠離我。

en: Make haste to help me, O Lord, my salvation!
zh: 拯救我的主啊！ 求你快來幫助我。
